content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学预计于9月8日08:00~12:00（UTC+8）进行校内设施维护。
       维护结束后需要重新登入并更新资源，补给物资将会通过信件向守密人发放。若有任何疑问，欢迎通过校区内客服中心咨询，感谢您的理解与支持！
    
【补给物资】
停服维护补偿：银芯×200、无垢之芯×5
     
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年9月22日09:00。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。

【更新内容】
一、活动
【角色活动：皮克曼】
● 在 9 月 8 日 9:00 - 10 月 6 日 9:00 期间，以下活动限时开放！
    ○ 角色活动唤醒「绘魇狂心」：血肉界域辅助型唤醒体「皮克曼」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒「错位双生」：命轮「写实主义悖谬」。
    ○ 试玩活动「绘者」：试用「皮克曼」。可以领取「银芯」×40、「流明之芯」×1。
● 玩法活动「画布的暗面」将于 9 月 8 日 9:00 - 9 月 22 日 9:00  开放！
    ○ 攻略活动将有机会获得活动限定 SR 命轮「渴求的画笔」与活动限定头像「以银钥之名：皮克曼」。
    ○ 活动期间「意识潜游：畸世绘」免费解锁开启！
    ○ 活动期间「绘者画室」系列精选礼盒限时上架！
 
【意识潜游：畸世绘】
● 「意识潜游」新增皮克曼篇章「畸世绘」！
    ○ 剧情简介：走入画室，坐上沙发，找一个舒服的姿势，安静地等待。皮克曼总是十分尊重自己的模特，很快，他将带你见证真正的艺术。不必害怕你将看到的，一切艺术，都是为了描绘世界的真实。贪婪与疯狂，即是这个世界的真相。
● 通关后，即可解锁全新钥令「虚世之彩」。
    ○ 钥令效果：选择一名唤醒体获得 20 狂气，将 1 张「灵感」洗入抽牌堆。若皮克曼在队伍中，使其获得 1 层「创意」。
 
【活动复刻：莱克】
● 在 9 月 22 日 9:00 - 10 月 6 日 9:00  期间，玩法活动复刻「名侦探手册」限时开放！
    ○ 攻略活动将有机会获得活动限定 SR 命轮「命运轮盘赌」与活动限定头像「以银钥之名：莱克」。
    ○ 活动期间「特遣纪录：狩猎愉快！」免费解锁开启！
    ○ 活动期间「侦探装束」系列精选礼盒限时上架！
 
【活动唤醒复刻】
● 在 9 月 22 日 9:00 - 10 月 20 日 9:00 期间，以下唤醒活动复刻限时开放！
● 「三相衡生」角色活动唤醒，活动期间可任意切换以下角色活动唤醒之一。
    ○ 角色活动唤醒复刻「命运玩家」：混沌界域辅助型唤醒体「莱克」。
    ○ 角色活动唤醒复刻「代行神愿」：血肉界域防御型唤醒体「萨尔瓦多」。
    ○ 角色活动唤醒复刻「诱心医者」：超维界域辅助型唤醒体「克莱门汀」。
    ○ 以上唤醒体试玩活动同步开放。
● 「因果苗圃」命轮活动唤醒，活动期间可任意切换以下命轮活动唤醒之一。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒复刻「决胜之夜」：命轮「好运时间」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒复刻「万物之初」：命轮「神言石板」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒复刻「苦痛追忆」：命轮「隐没的痛楚」。
 
【学园活动：第二十二期】
● 在 9 月 8 日 9:00 - 10 月 6 日 9:00 期间，以下学园活动限时开放！
● 第二十二期「学园礼赠」
    ○ 活动期间累计登录 7 天即可领取「流明之芯」×10 的丰厚奖励！累计登录 28 天可获得其他奖励！
● 第二十二期「课题纪录」
    ○ 本期核心课题·限定头像：「呆呆档案照：奥尔拉」、「呆呆档案照：哈姆林」。
    ○ 本期核心课题·限定对战表情：「课余时间篇：德克斯特·优雅」、「校园生活篇：哈姆林·吹笛」、「和平的一天：莉莉·谢谢」、「弥萨格日常：萨尔瓦多·圣光」。
● 第二十二赛季「畸世绘」
    ○ 本赛季·限定对战表情：「不高兴弥萨格：宁菲亚·惨」、「不高兴弥萨格：阿格里帕·委屈」、「校园生活篇：卡茜亚·魔术」、「弥萨格日常：旺达·抽打」。

二、战斗
【能力强化】
● 唤醒体「莱克」
    ○ 狂气爆发「肆意豪赌」：造成的基础伤害由 120％ 攻击力提高至 150％ 攻击力。
    ○ 天赋「灵塑适性」：莱克获得 10~20％ 暴击率。若通过战斗至少获取了 500 黑印，战斗开始时将 1 个「混沌的遗赠」升级。
● 唤醒体「菲茵特」
    ○ 狂气爆发「星之摇篮」：获得的反击由 100％ 攻击力提高为 120％攻击力。
    ○ 灵知觉醒「无边星彩」：获得的反击由 100％ 攻击力提高为 120％攻击力。偷取力量效果由 8％ 攻击力提高至 10％ 攻击力。
    ○ 启灵 1「双生之星」：现在未触发过死亡抵抗时也能够获得 50％ 伤害的临时反击。
    ○ 天赋「灵塑适性」：菲茵特施加的力量降低效果提高 10％。打出菲茵特的「指令卡」后，临时偷取「人型」敌人 5~10％ 菲茵特攻击力的力量，每回合最多生效 3 次。
● 唤醒体「雷娅」
    ○ 天赋「灵塑适性」：打出雷娅的「指令卡」后，获得 1~2％ 雷娅攻击力的力量，该效果随当前已损生命至多提高 200％，每回合最多生效 3 次。
 
【星辰篇】
● 归档刻痕：现在对「刻印」也会生效。
 
三、相位对弈
【全新内容】
● 唤醒体「皮克曼」
    ○ 凶星职阶，生命 88。
    ○ 狂气爆发「真实，亦是幻想」：消耗 100 点狂气。将自身三张不同的算力消耗为 0 的「技能」置入手牌，力量 +1。
    ○ 技能「实色侵染」：消耗 3 点算力。造成 10 麻痹。预备。 
    ○ 技能「幻梦绘生」：消耗 3 点算力。造成 10 中毒。预备。 
    ○ 技能「大放异彩」：消耗 3 点算力。对全体敌方造成 8 伤害。预备。 
● 命轮与钥令
    ○ 命轮「写实主义悖谬」：消耗 2 点算力。「狂气爆发」后随机将 1 张自身的「技能」置入手牌并使其算力消耗变为 0。
    ○ 命轮「渴求的画笔」：消耗 3 点算力。其他友方「狂气爆发」后抽 1 张牌。
    ○ 钥令「虚世之彩」：随机触发以下效果 3 次：对随机敌人造成 3 麻痹、对随机敌人造成 3 中毒、对所有敌人造成 3 伤害。
 
【游戏性调整】
● 唤醒体「凯蒂古拉」
    ○ 狂气爆发「焚却世界的爆炎」：伤害由 12 降低为 10。
    ○ 技能「告死魔弹」：基础伤害由 6 提高为 8，成长伤害由 2 降低为 1。
● 唤醒体「熔毁·朵尔」
    ○ 技能「天才的远见」：重做。消耗 1 点算力。选择：获得 2 算力，或抽 1 张牌。预备。
    ○ 技能「人性观察实验」：回复生命由 18 降低为 16，造成伤害由 12 降低为 10 。
● 命轮与钥令  
    ○ 命轮「苍白后裔」：算力消耗由 2 提高为 3 。
    ○ 命轮「死亡的剖析」：算力消耗由 3 降低为 2 。
    ○ 命轮「命运轮盘赌」：「技能」造成的伤害、治疗与护盾效果提高幅度从 5~25% 提高为 10~30%。
    ○ 钥令「错位命运」 ：重做。选择一名友方获得 1 层蓄力和 1 张黑羽，每有 2 名阵亡角色，额外获得 1 层蓄力。
● 唤醒体生命
    ○ 卡斯托尔：生命由 118 提高为 120。
    ○ 凯蒂古拉：生命由 92 提高为 104。
    ○ 哈姆林：生命由 101 提高为 102。
    ○ 诺缔拉：生命由 108 提高为 109。
    ○ 潘狄娅：生命由 104 提高为 105。
    ○ 环行·拉蒙娜：生命由 106 降低为 104。
    ○ 拉蒙娜：生命由 102 提高为 103。
    ○ 克莱门汀：生命由 99 降低为 98。
    ○ 卡茜亚：生命由 98 降低为 96。
    ○ 汀克特：生命由 96 降低为 95。
    ○ 法洛思：生命由 94 降低为 93。
    ○ 尤乌哈希：生命由 99 提高为 100。
    ○ 图鲁：生命由 93 提高为 98。
    ○ 杜勒赛因：生命由 102 降低为 97。
    ○ 索蕾尔：生命由 91 提高为 93。
    ○ 奥瑞塔：生命由 86 降低为 83。
    ○ 宁菲亚：生命由 84 降低为 82。
    ○ 克珀珊特：生命由 99 降低为 90。
    ○ 泰旖丝：生命由 85 提高为 88。
    ○ 珈伦：生命由 83 提高为 85。
    ○ 奥尔拉：生命由 81 提高为 82。
    ○ 朵尔：生命由 79 降低为 78。
    ○ 熔毁·朵尔：生命由 79 降低为 77。
    ○ 希莱斯特：生命由 77 降低为 72。
    ○ 雷娅：生命由 75 降低为 70。

四、综合
【优化】
● 「唤醒」的「唤醒详情」界面中增加了每个物品的详细综合概率信息。
● 「唤醒」的结果展示界面中增加了「继续唤醒」按钮，以便于快捷进行多次唤醒。
● 「剧情」界面中增加了「x4」倍速选项，切换后剧情文本将立即展示，以便于快速浏览剧情内容。
● 「剧情」中调整了一些表达人物反应的音效，使之与整体氛围更协调也更独特。
● 「活动」界面中进入玩法时，若「骑士的愿望」尚未通关，弹出的提示说明增加了关卡类型说明。
● 「回溯」中预览文本的位置进行了调整，使之更加整齐。
● 「界域精通」的详情描述现在支持拖拽以完整查看所有信息。
● 「探索」界面中左侧信息文本现在支持拖拽以完整查看所有信息。
 
五、问题修复
【战斗】
● 修复了唤醒体「萝坦」释放超限爆发后，获得的状态「混沌之兽」效果描述中错误包含了「打击卡造成的基础伤害提高」的问题，应当只提高「混沌之兽」造成的基础伤害。
● 修复了「忘却篇」与「星辰篇」造物「恩赐之血」造成治疗时未能正确减少「出血」状态，以及造成的治疗量未能正确享受「无底创痕」减益效果的问题。
● 修复了「忘却篇」第七章事件「孕育之母」可不选择卡牌跳过的问题。
● 修复了「忘却篇」第八章首领「双生矛盾」阶段切换可能会导致二倍速功能失效的问题。
● 修复了「忘却篇」第八章首领「双生矛盾」为卡牌添加的「侵蚀」词缀有错误句号的问题。
● 修复了「星辰篇」战斗界面篇章提示下方内战斗波次信息没有正确显示的问题。
● 修复了「星辰篇」第三章首领「腐潮之傀」阶段切换可能会导致音乐不正确的问题。
● 修复了「战斗」界面中敌人详情中的故事文本有时显示不完整的问题。
● 修复了「事件」中造物预览描述在英文语言中有时显示不完整的问题。
● 修复了「事件」在网络状况不佳时选项显示的造物与实际给予的造物有时不匹配的问题。
 
【功能】
● 修复了「登录」界面中在网络状况不佳时进入游戏可能出现卡顿的问题。
● 修复了「更新」界面中，客户端帧率飙升并导致发热的问题。
● 修复了「编队」界面中替换唤醒体的密契后，密契套装图标有时显示不正确的问题。
● 修复了克珀珊特「通讯器」对话中出现错别字的问题。
● 修复了课题记录「课题进阶」中「追忆羽笔」预览数量显示不正确的问题。
● 修复了幕间演习「禁忌纂录」界面首次解锁后界面可能发生卡死的问题。
● 修复了奥尔拉活动「在春天凋零以前」界面中提示窗口有时候没有正确关闭的问题。
● 修复了「商店」界面在某些情况下购买物品没有正确显示获得提示的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒」界面在跳过频繁时，音效有时未能正确停止的问题。
● 修复了「大厅」界面中部分唤醒体立绘边缘会错位的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」结算界面中点赞图标在部分语言设置下错误转行的问题。
● 修复了「亵渎」中弥利亚姆表情显示错误的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒」功能中「三相衡生」和「因果苗圃」的按钮颜色偏暗的问题。

**V2.3.2.0 Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
Mythag University is scheduled to conduct campus facility maintenance from 08:00 to 12:00 on September 8 (UTC+8).
You can enter the game once the maintenance is complete. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Server Maintenance Compensation: Silver*200, Pure Core*5
  
[Claim Conditions]
The collection period ends on September 22, 2025 at 09:00. Please remember to check your mailbox in time to collect the supplies.
  
[Update Content]
1. Activity
[Character Event: Pickman]
● The following events are available for a limited time from September 8, 9:00 to October 6, 9:00!
    ○ Character Event Awakening "Daubed in Nightmares": Caro Realm Chorus Awakener "Pickman".
    ○ WoD Event Awakening "Delirious Duality": Wheel of Destiny "Paradoxical Realism".
    ○ Trial event "The Painter": Try out "Pickman". You can receive "Silver" ×40, "Luminous Core" ×1.
● The gameplay event "Dark Side of the Canvas" will be available from September 8, 9:00 AM to September 22, 9:00 AM!
    ○ The strategy event will offer the chance to obtain the event-exclusive SR Wheel of Destiny "Thirsting Brush" and the event-exclusive avatar "By the Silver Key: Pickman".
    ○ During the event period, "Psyche Deepdive: Ghastly Canvas" is unlocked for free!
    ○ During the event, the "The Painter's Studio" series of selected gift boxes will be available for a limited time!

[Psyche Deepdive: Ghastly Canvas]
● The "Psyche Deepdive" has added the Pickman chapter "Ghastly Canvas"!
    ○ Plot Summary: Step into the studio, sit on the sofa, find a comfortable position, and quietly wait. Pickman always shows great respect for his models, and soon he will take you to witness true art. Do not fear what you will see; all art is meant to depict the Hidden Truth of the world. Greed and Madness are the truths of this world.
● Unlocks the new Posse "Void Hues" after clearing the level.
    ○ Posse Effect: Choose an Awakener to gain 20 Aliemus and shuffle 1 "Insight" into the draw pile. If Pickman is in the team, grant him 1 layer of "Creativity".
 
[Event Reenactment: Ryker]
● From September 22 at 9:00 to October 6 at 9:00, the gameplay event "Detective Handbook" is now available for a limited time!
    ○ The strategy event will offer the chance to obtain the event-exclusive SR Wheel of Destiny "Fate Roulette" and the event-exclusive avatar "By the Silver Key: Ryker".
    ○ During the event, "Special Ops: Happy Hunting!" is available for free unlock!
    ○ During the event, the "Detective Outfit" series Selected Gift Boxes are available for a limited time!

[Rerun]
● The following Awakening Events will be available for a limited time from September 22, 9:00 to October 20, 9:00!
● "Triune Verdant" Character Event Awakening allows switching between the following Character Event Awakenings at will during the event period.
    ○ Character Event Awakening Rerun "Fate's Player": Chaos Realm Chorus Awakener "Ryker".
    ○ Character Event Awakening Rerun "Herald of Divine Will": Warden Awakener "Salvador" from the Caro Realm.
    ○ Character Event Awakening Rerun "Temptation Healer": Ultra realm Chorus Awakener "Clementine".
    ○ The above Awakener trial event is also available.
● "Sylvan Omen" Wheel of Destiny Event Awakening, during the event you can freely switch between the following WoD Event Awakenings.
    ○ WoD Event Awakening "Night of Triumph": Wheel of Destiny "Hour of Fortune".
    ○ WoD Event Awakening Rerun "Primordial Dawn": Wheel of Destiny "Tablet of Scriptures".
    ○ WoD Event Awakening Rerun "Painful Reminiscence": Wheel of Destiny "Veiled Anguish".

[Mythag Events: Season 22]
● The following Mythag Events are available for a limited time from September 8, 9:00 to October 6, 9:00!
● Volume 22 "Gifts from Mythag"
    ○ Accumulate 7 days of login during the event to receive a generous reward of "Luminous Core" ×10! Accumulate 28 days of login to receive other rewards!
● Curriculum Issue 22
    ○ This issue's Premium Topics: Limited Avatars: "Chibi Mug Shot: Horla", "Chibi Mug Shot: Hameln".
    ○ This issue's Premium Topics·Limited Traphase Emotes: "After School: Dexter: Elegant", "School Life: Hameln: Flute", "Peaceful Day: Lily: Thank You", "Mythag Daily: Salvador: Holy Light".
● Season 22 "Ghastly Canvas"
    ○ This Season's Limited Traphase Emotes: "Unhappy Mythag: Nymphaea: Tragic", "Unhappy Mythag: Agrippa: Wronged", "School Life: Casiah: Magic", "Mythag Daily: Wanda: Whipping".

2. Battle
[Ability Enhancement]
● Awakener "Ryker"
    ○ Exalt "All-in!": The base damage dealt increases from 120% ATK to 150% ATK.
    ○ Talent "Soulforge Aptitude": Ryker gains 10~20% Crit. Rate. If at least 500 Black Sigils are obtained through battle, upgrade 1 "Chaotic Legacy" at the start of the battle.
● Awakener "Faint"
    ○ Exalt "Cradle of Stars": The Counter gained is increased from 100% ATK to 120% ATK.
    ○ Gnosis Rouse "Boundless Starlight": The Counter gained increases from 100% Attack to 120% Attack. The effect of STR Steal increases from 8% Attack to 10% Attack.
    ○ Enlighten 1 "Binary Stars": Now can gain a temporary Counter equal to 50% of the damage even when Death Resistance has not been triggered.
    ○ Talent "Soulforge Aptitude": The Strength Reduction effect applied by Faint is increased by 10%. After playing Faint's "Command Card", temporarily steal 5~10% of Faint's ATK as Strength from Humanoid enemies, up to 3 times per turn.
● Awakener "Leigh"
    ○ Talent "Soulforge Aptitude": After playing Leigh's "Command Card," gain 1-2% of Leigh's ATK as Strength. This effect can increase by up to 200% based on current lost HP, and can activate a maximum of 3 times per turn.
 
[Astral Reign]
● Archive Mark: Now effective for "Orison" as well.

3.Phase Traphase
[New Content]
● Awakener "Pickman"
    ○ Malphas class, HP 88.
    ○ Exalt "Truth in Delusion": Consumes 100 points of Aliemus. Add three different "Skills" with 0 Arithmetica cost to your hand, Strength +1.
    ○ Skill "True Color Infusion": Consumes 3 Arithmetica. Deals 10 Paralysis. Prepare.
    ○ Skill "Dream Painting": Consumes 3 Arithmetica. Inflicts 10 Poison. Prepare.
    ○ Skill "Shining Glory": Consumes 3 Arithmetica. Deal 8 DMG to all enemies. Prepare.
● Wheel of Destiny and Posse
    ○ Wheel of Destiny "Paradoxical Realism": Consumes 2 Arithmetica. After "Exalt", randomly place 1 of your own "Skill" cards into your hand and set its Arithmetica cost to 0.
    ○ Wheel of Destiny "Thirsting Brush": Consumes 3 Arithmetica. Other allies draw 1 card after using "Exalt".
    ○ Posse "Void Hues": Randomly trigger the following effects 3 times: deal 3 Paralysis to a random enemy, deal 3 Poison to a random enemy, deal 3 DMG to all enemies.
 
[Gameplay Adjustment]
● Awakener "Kathigu-Ra"
    ○ Exalt "World-Ending Inferno": Damage decreased from 12 to 10.
    ○ Skill "Death Bullet": Base DMG increased from 6 to 8, growth DMG reduced from 2 to 1.
● Awakener "Doll: Inferno"
    ○ Skill "Genius' Foresight": Redo. Consumes 1 point of Arithmetica. Choose: Gain 2 Arithmetica or draw 1 card. Prepare.
    ○ Skill "Humanity Observation Trial": HP Recovery reduced from 18 to 16, DMG reduced from 12 to 10.
● Wheel of Destiny and Posse
    ○ Wheel of Destiny "Pale Descendant": Arithmetica cost increases from 2 to 3.
    ○ Wheel of Destiny "Analysis of Death": Arithmetica cost reduced from 3 to 2.
    ○ Wheel of Destiny "Fate Roulette": The increase in damage, healing, and shield effects from "Skill" is raised from 5~25% to 10~30%.
    ○ Posse "Derison of Destiny": Redo. Choose a friendly unit to gain 1 layer of Charge and 1 Onyx Plume; for every 2 fallen characters, gain an additional layer of Charge.

● Awakener HP
    ○ Castor: HP increased from 118 to 120.
    ○ Kathigu-Ra: HP increased from 92 to 104.
    ○ Hameln: HP increased from 101 to 102.
    ○ Nautila: HP increased from 108 to 109.
    ○ Pandia: HP increased from 104 to 105.
    ○ Ramona: Timeworn: HP reduced from 106 to 104.
    ○ Ramona: HP increased from 102 to 103.
    ○ Clementine: HP reduced from 99 to 98.
    ○ Casiah: HP reduced from 98 to 96.
    ○ Tinct: HP reduced from 96 to 95.
    ○ Faros: HP reduced from 94 to 93.
    ○ Uvhash: HP increased from 99 to 100.
    ○ Tulu: HP increased from 93 to 98.
    ○ Doresain: HP reduced from 102 to 97.
    ○ Sorel: HP increased from 91 to 93.
    ○ Aurita: HP reduced from 86 to 83.
    ○ Nymphaea: HP reduced from 84 to 82.
    ○ Corposant: HP reduced from 99 to 90.
    ○ Thais: HP increased from 85 to 88.
    ○ Karen: HP increased from 83 to 85.
    ○ Horla: HP increased from 81 to 82.
    ○ Doll: HP reduced from 79 to 78.
    ○ Doll: Inferno: HP decreased from 79 to 77.
    ○ Celeste: HP reduced from 77 to 72.
    ○ Leigh: HP reduced from 75 to 70.

4. Comprehensive
[Optimize]
● The "Awakening Details" interface of "Awaken" has been updated to include detailed overall probability information for each item.
● The results display interface of "Awaken" now includes a "Continue Awakening" button for quick multiple awakenings.
● The "Story" interface has added a "4x" speed option. After switching, the storyline text will be displayed immediately for quick browsing of the storyline content.
● Adjusted some sound effects expressing character reactions in the "Story" to make them more coordinated and unique with the overall atmosphere.
● When entering gameplay in the "Event" interface, if "A Knight's Wish" has not been completed, the pop-up hint explanation will include a description of the level type.
● The position of the preview text in "Trace Back" has been adjusted for better alignment.
● The detailed description of "Realm Mastery" now supports dragging to view all information completely.
● The information text on the left side of the "Exploration" interface now supports dragging to view all information in full.

5. Problem Fix
[Battle]
● Fixed the issue where the status "Beast of Chaos" obtained after the Awakener "Lotan" unleashes Over-Exaltation incorrectly included the description "increases the base damage dealt by Strike cards," which should only increase the base damage dealt by "Beast of Chaos."
● Fixed the issue where the "Blessed Blood" relic from the "Faded Legacy" and "Astral Reign" chapters did not correctly reduce the "Bleed" state when healing, and the healing amount did not properly benefit from the "Bottomless Scar" debuff effect.
● Fixed the issue where the "Nourishing Mother" event in Chapter Seven of the Faded Legacy could skip card selection.
● Fixed an issue where the phase switch of the boss "Twin Contradiction" in Chapter Eight of "Faded Legacy" could cause the double speed function to fail.
● Fixed the issue with the incorrect period in the "Corrosion" affix added to the card by the boss "Twin Contradiction" in Chapter 8 of "Faded Legacy".
● Fixed the issue where the battle wave information was not displayed correctly under the chapter hints in the battle interface of "Astral Reign".
● Fixed an issue where the music could be incorrect during the phase transition of the boss "Puppet of Putrescence" in Chapter 3 of the Astral Reign.
● Fixed the issue where the story text in the enemy details on the "Battle" interface sometimes appeared incomplete.
● Fixed the issue where the relic preview description in the "Event" sometimes displayed incompletely in the English language.
● Fixed the issue where the relics displayed in the event options did not always match the actual relics given when the network conditions were poor.

[Function]
● Fixed the issue where the game might experience lag when entering the "Login" screen under poor network conditions.
● Fixed the issue of client frame rate spiking and causing overheating in the "Update" interface.
● Fixed the issue where the Covenant set icon sometimes displayed incorrectly after replacing the Awakener in the Lineup interface.
● Fixed the typo issue in the dialogue of Corposant's "communicator."
● Fixed the issue with the incorrect preview quantity display for "Remembrance Feather Pen" in the "Extra Curriculum" of the Curriculum.
● Fixed an issue where the "Verboten Covenant" interface could become unresponsive after being unlocked for the first time in the Interlude.
● Fixed an issue where the hint window in the Horla event "Before Spring Fades" sometimes did not close correctly.
● Fixed an issue where the "Store" interface did not correctly display the acquisition prompt when purchasing items in certain situations.
● Fixed the issue where the sound effect sometimes failed to stop correctly when skipping frequently on the "Awaken" interface.
● Fixed the issue where the edges of some Awakener character art would be misaligned in the "Lobby" interface.
● Fixed the issue where the like icon in the "Traphase" settlement interface would incorrectly wrap to the next line in certain language settings.
● Fixed the issue with Miryam's emote display in "Desecrate."
● Fixed the issue with the button colors being too dark for "Triune Verdant" and "Sylvan Omen" in the "Awaken" function.
